economic_notes: Tribe operates a Gas Bar and Convenience Store financed by Bank of Montreal loan. 677626 Alberta Ltd. (GBE) operates with revenue of $1,828,323 in 2022. Louis Bull Services generates revenue of $2,919,843. Environmental reclamation project underway for former truck stop/gas bar site with $2,830,000 received from ISC. COVID-19 additional funding of $4,673,684 received from ISC in 2022.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - a specific controlled entity (Asikiw Mostos O'pikinawasiwin Society) was excluded from consolidation because its financial information was not available for satisfactory audit verification. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($24,177,771) plus CMHC subsidies ($476,635). Deferred revenue is very large at $17,245,847 largely due to ISC deferred funding of $14,267,687. Contingent liability of $1,967,506 from Chevron royalty claim currently under appeal. Federal Trust Funds of $873,360 included in financial assets. 677626 Alberta Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Kiseputinow Holdings (1996) Ltd. is fully consolidated subsidiary.
